# MartiniSurf Documentation

MartiniSurf is a toolkit to build surface-immobilized biomolecular systems in Martini simulations

```{toctree}
:maxdepth: 2
:caption: Contents

overview
installation
examples
cli
USER_GUIDE
```

## Quick links

- Source repository: `README.md` (root)
- Full user guide: {doc}`USER_GUIDE`
- Recommended complete examples: {doc}`examples`
